name: zindex_archive_load_index_from_tail
description: zIndexArchive::LoadIndexFromTail reads the trailing index footer, validates the magic value, grows the record buffer, reads the record table, rewinds the file, stores the record count, and reports success.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?LoadIndexFromTail@zIndexArchive@@QAEHXZ at 0x4a63f0 still fails: 178 unmasked mismatches, 20 relocation bytes masked, 1 trailing VC NOP byte trimmed, BN size 210 bytes, VC object symbol size 208 bytes.

Reviewed difference is register allocation and imported Win32 call staging around GetFileSize, SetFilePointer, and ReadFile. The native mount smoke writes a one-record archive, exercises LoadIndexFromTail through Init/MountIndexArchive, validates record count/name lookup, and opens the payload by name.
